title: Validate No Implicit Any Executor
description: Validates that no function parameter, variable, or property has an implicit `any` type. Uses the TypeScript compiler (with noImplicitAny override) to detect TS7006/7005/7018/etc violations on changed lines only.

mode.description: OFF: skip validation. MODIFIED_CODE: only implicit-any on changed lines in diff. MODIFIED_FILES: all implicit-any in modified files.

disableAllowed.description: Whether // webpieces-disable no-implicit-any comments work. When false, no escape hatch.

ignoreModifiedUntilEpoch.description: Epoch seconds. Until this time, skip validation entirely. When expired, normal mode resumes. Omit when not needed.
